JavaScript tests for `Math.ceil` function behavior with various inputs, including `NaN`, zero, infinity, and decimals.


## Files
- **[15.08.02.06-001.js](15.08.02.06-001.js.md)**: Tests that `Math.ceil` returns `NaN` when the input is `NaN`.
- **[15.08.02.06-002.js](15.08.02.06-002.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of `Math.ceil` with positive zero in JavaScript.
- **[15.08.02.06-003.js](15.08.02.06-003.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of `Math.ceil` with negative zero in JavaScript.
- **[15.08.02.06-004.js](15.08.02.06-004.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of Math.ceil with negative infinity in JavaScript.
- **[15.08.02.06-005.js](15.08.02.06-005.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of Math.ceil with Infinity in JavaScript.
- **[15.08.02.06-006.js](15.08.02.06-006.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of `Math.ceil` with negative decimal input in JavaScript.
- **[15.08.02.06-007.js](15.08.02.06-007.js.md)**: Tests the `Math.ceil` function with a negative decimal input in JavaScript.
- **[15.08.02.06-008.js](15.08.02.06-008.js.md)**: Tests the Math.ceil function with a negative decimal input.
- **[15.08.02.06-009.js](15.08.02.06-009.js.md)**: Tests the `Math.ceil` function to verify it rounds 1.9 up to 2.
- **[15.08.02.06-010.js](15.08.02.06-010.js.md)**: Tests the `Math.ceil` function to verify it rounds 1.1 up to 2.
- **[15.08.02.06-011.js](15.08.02.06-011.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of Math.ceil with a string input that represents "NaN".
- **[15.08.02.06-012.js](15.08.02.06-012.js.md)**: Tests that `Math.ceil` returns `NaN` when applied to a new `Object`.
